## takumi validate

Check workspace and package configs for errors

### Synopsis

Validate all configuration files in the workspace.

Checks takumi.yaml, all takumi-pkg.yaml files, and takumi-versions.yaml
for structural errors, missing fields, invalid values, unresolved
dependencies, and dependency cycles.

```
takumi validate [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for validate
```
